mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PIECE_WORK_TEAM(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, IS_UPDATE_STORAGE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pieceProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pieceProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isUpdateStorage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_PIECE_WORK_TEAM
ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PIECE_PROJECT_CODE = #{pieceProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PIECE_PROJECT_NAME = #{pieceProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_UPDATE_STORAGE = #{isUpdateStorage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CREATE_BY_NAME = #{createByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM M_PIECE_WORK_TEAM WHERE ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
